feed.title: AO3 - Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: How Fatherhood Changes a Man (and Certain Policies of State)
entry.summary:
Author: mayoInYourWalls

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 60,625Chapters: 12/20Kudos: 41

Summary: Most everyone Merlin knew warned him that nothing good would ever come of his little (though astonishingly requited) crush on the Lady Morgana. Merlin was, as of now, finding himself in agreement, as she made her dramatic return to Camelot one year after Merlin had attempted to kill her with hemlock. But when Merlin discovers the child, his child, he can say at least one very good thing, as well many more exceedingly ridiculous and complicated things, certainly had come of it. Featuring pervasive passive aggression and a general sense of melancholy, an extended and distinctly non peaceful political process to legalising magic, a not entirely willing family trip to Ealdor, and some foreign diplomatic negotiations somewhat lacking in diplomacy.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Within Four Walls
entry.summary:
Author: Oakfiddle

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,543Chapters: 4/9Kudos: 21

Summary: Merlin and his mum wans to move away from Ealdor to get a fresh start, to leave his mum's abusive ex-boyfriend behind.They go to Camelot to look at a flat. His mum falls in love with the flat, and Merlin falls in love with the property manager, who also happens be the landlord's son.Why can't life be simple for once?

entry.title: King & Court
entry.summary:
Author: BeautifulFiction

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 332,660Chapters: 71/110Kudos: 3,250

Summary: Loneliness is an insidious thing. When Merlin looks at Arthur, he sees not just a prince waiting for his time to rule, but a young man struggling to find his place in the world, with little help from anyone else. The truth is, Arthur needs more than the friendship Merlin can offer. He needs people he can trust: men and women who will become his court and his confidants, and if he is going to survive to take the throne and lead Camelot into its golden age, he needs them sooner rather than later. Finding loopholes in Uther’s laws is no easy feat. Court life is a dangerous game, but it’s one Merlin has every intention of winning so that Arthur can have knights of his choosing by his side. And then there is the matter of his magic…

entry.title: Young Hearts, Run Free
entry.summary:
Author: NotoriousJYT

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 43,545Chapters: 8/20Kudos: 170

Summary: The night before Arthur faces his uncle's wraith, Merlin gives him a sword, a favor, and—unexpectedly—his heart. What begins as comfort before battle becomes something neither can deny: a bond that burns gold in their chests and rewrites the prophecy itself. But Camelot is no place for love that defies a king's law. When the Questing Beast appears in the Forest Sauvage and Morgana's magic begins to wake, Arthur must choose between the prince Uther demands and the king Albion needs. Between fear and wonder. Between destiny and desire. No longer two sides of the same coin—they're becoming one joined at the heart. And the land itself is watching. Canon divergence from 1x10. Slow-burn that catches fire. Epic scope, intimate moments, and a love that changes everything.

entry.title: makes the whole world blind
entry.summary:
Author: schweet_heart

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,015Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 103

Summary: “Put down your sword,” the man said. “Arthur,” Leon began, but Arthur was already doing it. He laid the sword on the ground and stood with his hands up, showing that he was unarmed. “Now release him,” he said. He still wasn’t looking at Merlin, because if he looked at him now he knew exactly what he would find, and he wasn’t sure he’d be able to go through with it if he saw Merlin watching him with those beautiful, blazing eyes. “Release him, and I’ll come with you. Harm him, and you all die.”

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Island in the Sun
entry.summary:
Author: bad_peppermint

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,113Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 5

Summary: It’s stupid, really. Dumb. The kind of mistake Arthur can’t believe he’d make.He wades into the water without hesitation, a familiar cold rush that soaks his shorts and rashguard in moments, and waves to a couple of familiar faces in the shallows before he throws himself onto his board. He lets the waves crash over his head on his way out, distracted by the sun dipping towards the horizon and the gulls overhead and the memory of Merlin’s lips on his skin – it really is a gorgeous day, fuck.Or it was.

entry.title: the ghost come back
entry.summary:
Author: indigotigress7

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,660Chapters: 2/6Kudos: 17

Summary: Twenty-first-century Merlin, tired of waiting for Arthur to return, travels back in time determined to make the best of a second chance in Camelot.(Gaius, still reeling from watching his nephew drink from a poisoned chalice and nearly perish from its effects, is almost too relieved that Merlin has woken up at all to notice how strangely he’s behaving.)(Almost.)

entry.title: Curia Regis
entry.summary:
Author: THELASTDRAGON

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,955Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 96

Summary: A court Adviser that has been under Uther for decades starts to worry about what will happen when the old king dies and his son, Arthur, takes over. So he plans to win the Young prince’s favor by giving him the thing he wants the most… Merlin.

entry.title: Soldier, Servant, Poet, King
entry.summary:
Author: Grammar_Beane

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 44,958Chapters: 21/24Kudos: 199

Summary: Arthur and Merlin were just going on a hunting trip. It was meant to be a nice, easy trip through the woods around Camelot. It ended with them being chased by an unknown monster into an unknown cave, stepping out into an unknown world. Maybe the weird bard and the magic monster hunter they found in the woods could help? Jaskier and Geralt were on their way north for the winter—Jaskier to Oxenfurt, Geralt to Kaer Morhen. But they were still a ways away when two odd men claiming to be from a place called “Camelot” stumbled into them. Geralt immediately learned Merlin has magic, and Jaskier could see the chemistry between the pair from a mile away. Arthur wanted to get back to Camelot.Merlin wanted to get back to Camelot, and stay alive while his magic seemed intent on acting bizarre.Geralt wanted to travel with Jaskier.Jaskier wanted to travel with Geralt, and get those two idiots to confess everything. It took some time, but they all got what they wanted. More or less.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Different Destiny: The Outlaw Prince
entry.summary:
Author: tansyuduri

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 97,064Chapters: 20/25Kudos: 216

Summary: When Merlin's magic is exposed shortly before season 2 starts, the path of destiny starts changing forever. Now on the run with Arthur, Morgana, and Gwen. Merlin hopes to convince Arthur that magic is totally good instead of him and Morgana just being an exception. Morgana, meanwhile, hopes to convince him to usurp his father. As allies are gathered and Arthur realizes the injustice in his kingdom, it looks more and more like he will have to act in a drastic way. A way he dreads.   Meanwhile, Arthur and Merlin are growing closer and closer and might just have feelings for each other. Something they probably should be better about realizing, considering the example of Gwen and Morgana right next to them.   In a land of myth and a time of magic, the destiny of a great kingdom now rests on the shoulders of four, their names: Merlin, Arthur, Guinevere, and Morgana

entry.title: Destiny Unfold
entry.summary:
Author: chronic_pain_in_the_ass

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 113,556Chapters: 10/65Kudos: 106

Summary: No young man, no matter how great, or mystic can know his destiny. He cannot glimpse his part in the great story that is about to unfold. Like everyone, he must live and learn. And so, it will be for the young magic arriving at the gates of Camelot. A boy that will, in time, father the legend. His name: Merlin.OrA rewrite of Merlin if the writers weren’t cowards. A lot gayer, magic users aren’t the enemy in every single episode, and Uther is the actual villain of the story. Morgana is still a villain, but we have sympathy for her.

entry.title: Golden Hair/Golden Eyes
entry.summary:
Author: wryterwolf

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 66,116Chapters: 13/?Kudos: 137

Summary: A rewriting of the series where Arthur discovers Merlin's magic way earlier. It will follow the series where it can and diverge as needed, with some fun little scenes inspired by Tumblr posts.This begins in the aftermath of the battle for Ealdor. Also don’t forget to check out part 2 of the series. It has additional backstory and plot.

entry.title: Spells and Swords
entry.summary:
Author: ilikereadingig

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 73,824Chapters: 12/?Kudos: 144

Summary: A complete re-write of s1-3 of Merlin with a female Merlin. Lots of Gwen and Merlin and Morgana friendship and bullying Arthur. "Look at the fire, see how the logs crack with the flames, that will be your bones if you are discovered. Look at how the bark crumbles into ash, that will be your skin peeling apart. You must keep your magic secret or this will be your fate”

entry.title: Again
entry.summary:
Author: Igni_hendricks

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 107,286Chapters: 18/?Kudos: 466

Summary: When Merlin kills Morgana, she thinks it’s finally over. But then she wakes up several years in the past, in the heart of Camelot, surrounded by the very people she wants dead.She needs a plan, and she needs answers. Neither of these things turn out to be as simple as they seem, and Morgana begins to wonder if there could have been a different path for her after all.

entry.title: Walk of Shame
entry.summary:
Author: VeloxVoid

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 19,316Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 128

Summary: Arthur walks back through the streets of Camelot at daybreak, ruffled and dishevelled. To the citizens who sneak glances and whisper, the reason for his walk is a mystery. But to Arthur, mind still reeling after his first night with Merlin, it's his walk of shame. - Arthur and Merlin both fall deeper into a romance that they know can never be. One night's walk of shame turns into many.

entry.title: Between Magic and Mind
entry.summary:
Author: painting_carnations

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 22,771Chapters: 5/5Kudos: 48

Summary: "He needed his magic to be stronger, needed more control over it as well. A whole lifetime plus ten years of guided practice, you would think he would be better. But he still made mistakes. Mistakes that can't happen. Merlin would figure something out." or Where Merlin takes a potion to strengthen his control over his own magic, only it works a little too well. He gains a few odd skills he didn't have before, including the ability to hear the minds of those around him, magic or not. No one's thoughts surprise him so much as the King's. Or his Uncle's.

entry.title: *Pages through your secret diary* OwO what's this?
entry.summary:
Author: SH_After_Vesper

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,244Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 48

Summary: --- “Did you intend for me to find these?” Arthur asked, opening his hand and flattening the parchment on the table. Merlin’s stomach dropped. He lunged to stand, but Arthur was faster, a firm hand pressing down on the back of his neck. Arthur leaned in, lips hairs away from his ears, "Do you want me to do these things to you, Merlin?" In a last-ditch attempt at saving his dignity, Merlin shook his head no, and was about to say as much when Arthur's hand squeezed, "Don't", he growled, "lie to me". "I'm sorry," Merlin exhaled, but Arthur's grip did not relent, as that wasn't answering his question. "Yes." --- During a rutine search of the castle for magical objects, Arthur finds a particular stash of pages that Merlin had tried to keep hidden. But it isn't about magic. No. It's about something far worse. --- Written for Merthur Microfic, prompt: Pages

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin)
  • Merlin (Merlin)
  • Arthur Pendragon (Merlin)
  • Merthur Microfic

  • turns out arthur's into it and matched merlin's freak
  • inappropriate use of stocks
